name: n8n-nodes-synology-suite
description: n8n community nodes for Synology DSM (Drive, Office/Sheets, MailPlus) - AI Agent compatible
author: Maxime Olivier

scripts.copy:assets: cp nodes/SynologyDrive/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyDrive/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyDrive/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyDrive/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologySheets/*.png dist/nodes/SynologySheets/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologySheets/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologySheets/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyMailPlus/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyMailPlus/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyMailPlus/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyMailPlus/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyMailPlusTrigger/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyMailPlusTrigger/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyMailPlusTrigger/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyMailPlusTrigger/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyOffice/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyOffice/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyOffice/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyOffice/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyApi/*.png dist/nodes/SynologyApi/ 2>/dev/null; cp nodes/SynologyApi/*.svg dist/nodes/SynologyApi/ 2>/dev/null; true
